title: Daily Standup Update
description: 30-second standup: what you did yesterday, what's next, what's blocking. Crisp and casual.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, your turn. What's the update?

templates.text: Yesterday I finished the API integration for the new search endpoint.
templates.hint_zh: 昨天我把新搜尋 API 串接收工了。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Nice. Did the staging tests pass?

templates.text: Mostly. Two flaky ones — I'll dig in this morning.
templates.hint_zh: 大致過,兩個間歇性失敗,我今早會看。

templates.text: Pair with Sam on the caching layer, then start on the load test.
templates.hint_zh: 跟 Sam 一起做快取層,然後開始壓測。

templates.text: I need staging credentials from infra. I'll ping them after standup.
templates.hint_zh: 我需要基礎架構組給 staging 的憑證,站會後我會去問。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Cool. Let me know if it stalls more than a day.

templates.text: Will do. Passing to the next person.
